_note: Indicative median weekly rents for demo purposes, based on public NSW Rent and Sales Report style data. Verify/refresh from https://www.dcj.nsw.gov.au/about-us/families-and-communities-statistics/housing-rent-and-sales.html before the demo. 'places' are well-known landmarks used to personalise the map; coordinates are approximate.

suburbs.name: Parramatta
suburbs.notes: Major western hub; jobs, hospital, university nearby

suburbs.name: Granville
suburbs.notes: Affordable, diverse community, close to Parramatta

suburbs.name: Ashfield
suburbs.notes: Inner west, multicultural, close to city

suburbs.name: Liverpool
suburbs.notes: South west, most affordable on this list

places.name: Westfield Parramatta
places.desc: Big shopping centre — Coles, Woolworths, Aldi and everyday shops under one roof.

places.name: Church Street 'Eat Street'
places.desc: A long strip of affordable cafes and restaurants from every cuisine.

places.name: Parramatta Park
places.desc: Huge riverside park — free to enjoy, great for a walk or picnic.

places.name: Parramatta Station & Ferry
places.desc: Trains, buses and a ferry to the city — your main transport hub.

places.name: Service NSW Parramatta
places.desc: Government one-stop shop for licences, registrations and IDs.

places.name: Westmead Hospital
places.desc: Major public hospital with a large emergency department.

places.name: Auburn Central & international grocers
places.desc: Affordable supermarkets plus Middle Eastern and Asian grocery stores.

places.name: Auburn Road eateries
places.desc: Turkish bakeries, kebabs and budget-friendly family restaurants.

places.name: Auburn Botanic Gardens
places.desc: Peaceful Japanese-style gardens — a lovely free spot to relax.

places.name: South Street food strip
places.desc: Lebanese sweets, charcoal chicken and cheap eats near the station.

places.name: Granville Station
places.desc: Train interchange with quick links to Parramatta and the city.

places.name: Westpoint Blacktown
places.desc: Large shopping centre with major supermarkets and cheap shops.

places.name: Western Sydney Parklands
places.desc: One of the world's largest urban parks — cycling, BBQs and playgrounds.

places.name: Westfield Liverpool
places.desc: Everything in one place — supermarkets, banks and Service NSW nearby.

places.name: Service NSW Liverpool
places.desc: Sort your licence, registration and other government tasks here.

places.name: Liverpool Hospital
places.desc: Major public hospital serving the south-west.

places.name: Bankstown food scene
places.desc: Famous for Vietnamese pho, banh mi and late-night dessert spots.

places.name: Bankstown Central
places.desc: Shopping centre with affordable supermarkets and fresh produce markets.

places.name: Strathfield Korean BBQ strip
places.desc: Korean BBQ, fried chicken and dessert cafes near the station.

places.name: Strathfield Station
places.desc: One of Sydney's biggest interchanges — fast trains everywhere.

places.name: Ashfield Shanghai eats
places.desc: Known for Shanghainese dumplings and pan-fried buns.

places.name: Ashfield Mall
places.desc: Handy local mall with supermarkets and everyday services.

places.name: Westfield Hurstville
places.desc: Big shopping centre and a large Asian grocery scene around it.

places.name: Forest Road food strip
places.desc: Cantonese, Hong Kong cafes and bubble tea galore.

places.name: Chatswood Chase & Westfield
places.desc: Two large malls side by side with supermarkets and food courts.

places.name: Chatswood food courts
places.desc: Buzzing Asian eat streets — ramen, hotpot and dumplings.

places.name: Bondi Beach
places.desc: Sydney's iconic beach with a famous coastal walk to Coogee.

places.name: Coogee Beach
places.desc: Family-friendly beach with calm bays and ocean pools.

places.name: Manly Beach
places.desc: Reached by a scenic ferry from the city — surf and seaside dining.

places.name: Cronulla Beach
places.desc: The only Sydney beach you can reach directly by train.

places.name: Sydney Olympic Park
places.desc: Wetlands, bike paths and big event venues — easy to reach by train.

places.name: Centennial Park
places.desc: Vast green park near the city — perfect for picnics and cycling.
